---
title: "Reproducibility"
format: html
---

Computational reproducibility ensures others can:

-   rerun code;

-   regenerate equations, tables, and figures;

-   practically learn;

-   repurpose and build upon an OER;

-   test claims.

To support reproducibility:

-   include datasets or provide download links;

-   avoid hard coded paths;

-   document dependencies.

[![](images/clipboard-2765196364.png){fig-align="center" width="50"}](/Modular%20OERs/Modular-Reusable.html)
